mapper.sql: id, product_id, product_name, category_name, nickname, rating, review_text, image_url, analysis_status, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.insert:
insert into litemall_ai_demo_review
product_id, product_name, category_name, nickname, rating, review_text, image_url, analysis_status, created_time, updated_time, deleted,
#{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reviewText,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{imageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{analysisStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.select:
select
from litemall_ai_demo_review where deleted = 0 and analysis_status = 'pending' order by created_time asc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.update: update litemall_ai_demo_review set analysis_status = #{analysisStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select analysis_status as name, count(*) as value from litemall_ai_demo_review where deleted = 0 group by analysis_status
